title: Creative world
description: The mod will add various interesting items and blocks to the game.
body:
## important!

**Even though the mod has been developed for a long time, it still contains many bugs and is mostly unbalanced and unfinished! I do not recommend using it in my large builds.**

**The current description is valid only for the latest version of the mod!**

## Review.

Introducing a Minecraft modification that allows you to go beyond the limitations of survival mode and unlock the potential of creative mode. This mod not only provides access to exclusive items, but also organically integrates the creative mode when creating certain items, as well as using certain tools and armor.

## Ores and materials.

Tin: It is an ore from which armor and tools can be created, which are slightly weaker than iron, but stronger than stone, are common and sometimes used to create mechanisms.

Bronze: An alloy of tin and copper in a ratio of 1 to 3, respectively. It is used to create mechanisms, tools and armor that are equal in strength to iron, and sometimes surpass them.

Composite: a cheap but powerful enough material used to create tools and armor that have good strength and strength approximately equal to diamond. It consists of 3 bronze, carbon and iron plates. It is sometimes used to create mechanisms.

Titanium: This is an ore from which you can create armor and tools that are stronger than non-cerite ones are extremely rare and sometimes used to create mechanisms.

Accumulatium: this is an ore from which you can create armor and tools that are stronger than non-cerite is extremely rare. It is a high-temperature superconductor, has great strength, and can be used to create ultra-high-capacity batteries.

Creativium: this is an ore from which you can create armor and tools that are stronger than non-cerite is extremely rare. It is used to gain abilities similar to those in creativity. A material with colossal strength. 

## Mechanisms.

Solar panel: The use of solar energy for sustainable electricity generation.

Coal generator: Turning coal into a reliable source of energy.

Rechargeable battery: Efficient storage of excess energy.

Crusher: Crushing of materials for improved ore processing and other applications.

Electric Jetpack: Take to the skies with this advanced vehicle. An improved version is available.

## Tools.

Iron key: Turn the mechanisms in any direction. It will help with their dismantling (without using a key, only the case falls out).

Iron hammer: A primitive method of crushing, helps in the creation of plates.

Wire cutters: Necessary to create wires and something else.

Bedrock breaker: Used to destroy the bedrock.

## Liquids.

Gas and oil: New liquids appearing underground. They are used for crafting and energy production.

## Additional features.

Explore the extensive range of QoL items.
Achieve several achievements, the list of which is constantly expanding.
